title: podman run & attach: missing or nonfunctional --sig-proxy option
body:
`docker attach` provides a --sig-proxy option, defaulting to true. podman does not offer the equivalent.

I'm not sensing an urgent need for this. Filing issue merely for sake of completeness.

comments.body: We're also missing `sig-proxy` with `podman run` - the option is there, but it's not plugged into anything.
